mnemonics: My Very Eager Mother Just Served Us Nachos (for Multiplexer, Decoder, Encoder, Adder, Subtractor, ALU)
Half Adders are LAZY (Lacks carry-in, Adds two bits, Zero carry-in)
keyPoints: Combinational circuits have outputs that depend only on the present combination of inputs.
Basic building blocks include Multiplexers (MUX), Decoders, Encoders, and Adders.
A set of basic logic gates (AND, OR, NOT) can be used to implement any combinational function.
commonMistakes: Forgetting to account for the carry-out in a full adder when chaining them for multi-bit addition.
